backend.choice_reason: Model-local Python 3.10 venv with pip matched the upstream package workflow and was the lowest-risk executable backend on this host.

history.mitigation: Resolved fixture and model paths to absolute locations before rerunning inference.

notes: Phase-1 target passed on the minimal non-streaming FireRedVAD path using CPU-only execution. A first infer attempt failed due to harness-relative fixture path resolution, then passed after targeted mitigation. No policy escalation artifact was required.
